tour.empty_tour_text: This Tour is Empty, Please try another tour
tour.start_tour_text: Start your quiz tour by tapping the button below.
tour.quiz_error_text: Your answer was incorrect, please retry
tour.resolution_confirmation: Do you really want the resolution now?
